core_mechanism: Continuous (Lie) symmetry-group analysis of a differential equation: computing the infinitesimal generators that leave the equation invariant, which close into a Lie algebra, and using these generators to perform invariant/similarity reductions that lower the number of independent variables
brief_reason: The abstract uses the equation's point symmetries, finding an infinite-dimensional Lie algebra of generators and feeding these symmetry vectors into a reduction process that collapses the parent PDE to lower-dimensional equations, with a singularity (Painleve) test then applied to the reduced equation as a complementary integrability check.
